name: manuscript_update
command: Update the manuscript to incorporate the final Parquet simulation results, refresh Figure 4, and add Data‑Availability statement.

name: sensitivity_analysis
command: Run the full factorial sensitivity and robustness analysis using scripts/sensitivity_parquet.py and generate summary figure.

name: ecological_calibration
command: Gather empirical species‑specific dispersal parameters and validate the OSM‑derived habitat‑quality layer; update data/derived files and document in a calibration report.

name: skeptic_review
command: Conduct a Skeptic review: null‑model simulations, power analysis, and robustness to hub/edge failures; summarize in a review document.

name: internal_joint_review
command: Notify the Quantitative Modeler, Domain Scientist, and Deputy Integrator, collect their comments on the manuscript and analysis, and synthesize a consolidated feedback document.

name: broader_impact
command: Draft a concise broader‑impact paragraph summarizing societal relevance and outreach plan, and add it to the impact checklist.

name: public_repo_release
command: Create a public GitHub repository, push code, notebook, CI workflow, data‑availability statement, and update the manuscript with the repo URL.
